name: release-check-repo
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo |
 policy: evidence,safety-gates,quality-gates{release,git},deterministic-output |
 lens: release-gatekeeper |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: TARGET_BRANCHES
required_inputs.description: Branches involved in the release, such as source/dev and target/main.

required_inputs.name: REMOTE_NAME
required_inputs.description: Remote expected to receive the release refs. Default is origin.

required_inputs.name: TAG_INTENT
required_inputs.description: Candidate tag or version label to validate for collisions.

required_inputs.name: REPO_EXPECTATIONS
required_inputs.description: Extra repository preconditions such as clean worktree, tracking branch, or remote push access.
